--- Main Page ---
Discover Our Rich Black Coffee Blends at 404 Coffee
Community                              Culture                                 Coffee
ORDER NOW
Welcome to 404 Coffee, where community meets culture, comfort and flavor. Nestled in the heart of the historic Black Pittsburgh neighborhood, we’re more than just a café – we’re a space that blends the charm of Old Atlanta with the vibrancy of the New Atlanta.  At 404 Coffee, we love our coffee but we know variety is the spice of life. That's why we offer a delicious range of options, from savory breakfast sandwiches to refreshing smoothies and everything in between. Whether you’re grabbing a quick bite, enjoying your favorite espresso beverage or relaxing with a pastry, you’ll find something to satisfy every craving.  Our café is designed to bring you "The 404 Experience" – a unique blend of Atlanta’s rich history and its exciting future. While sipping on your coffee, take a moment to snap a selfie with a view of one of Atlanta’s iconic landmarks just around the corner.  Join us at 404 Coffee, where every visit is a chance to enjoy great drinks tasty treats and community  –    Kelli J
Gift Cards
Make someone's day by giving them a 404 Coffee gift card! Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, or just because.

--- Page: /about ---
Coffee Shop With Wifi, Cafe, Coffee Shop - 404 Coffee - Atlanta, Georgia
Community                              Culture                                 Coffee
Located in the historic Black Pittsburgh neighborhood,
404 Coffee
is where Atlanta’s past and present come together over a great cup of coffee. More than just a café, we’re a community gathering space—a place for locals and visitors alike to connect, unwind and experience the best of what Atlanta has to offer.
Our mission is simple:
to serve exceptional coffee and delicious food while celebrating the rich culture and spirit of Atlanta.
We believe in quality, creativity and the power of great conversation. Our menu goes beyond coffee featuring everything from hearty breakfast sandwiches to refreshing smoothies and locally made pastries—something for everyone.
At
404 Coffee
, we are deeply committed to supporting our community. Owned by
Kelli, a proud legacy resident of Pittsburgh
, our café is a space where both familiar faces and newcomers feel at home. Whether you’re grabbing your morning brew, catching up with friends or snapping a selfie in front of Atlanta’s iconic landmarks, we’re here to make every moment memorable.
Join us and experience
"The 404 Experience"
—a perfect blend of
Old Atlanta charm and New Atlanta energy
, served fresh with every cup.

meta.meta_description: At 404 Coffee, we offer a variety of black coffee blends that will satisfy your taste buds. Enjoy our delicious coffee without the long lines and high prices of Starbucks.
